title: Clay Soldiers
description: Adds Clay Soldiers that fight for you!
body: # Clay Soldiers ![clay soldiers in action](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/530/448/horses.png) # Clay Soldiers Fight! ![Red and Blue Clay Soldiers fight each other](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d46fbaa2d1e253a665933386629dd04ca46ad636.png) ![Before the Fight...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e428da7258e166c8899fe3637df111ec508597b.png) # Upgrades ## Leather Upgrade ![Leather Upgrade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/961fa5a93e160d092e078505b8c9c0c1b24f7665.png) ## Stick Upgrade ![Stick Upgrade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a5605aa7dbd807b6c8d9708f1683dcedcc4acf8.png) ## Glowstone Upgrade ![Glowstone Upgrade makes soldiers Glow in Dark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ca79d013dd2ebd43825945048909321cff79f4b.png) | Upgrade Item | Description | Requires | Durability | |:------------:|---------------------------------------------|:--------:|:----------:| | Stick | Increases Attack damage by 2 | --- | 20 | | Flint | Increases Attack damage by 1 | Stick | --- | | Glowstone | Makes the Soldier glow in the dark | --- | --- | | Leather | Gives a leather armor / 3 Armor points | --- | 20 | | Wool | Upgrades the leather Armor / 2 Armor points | Leather | --- | (More Upgrades coming) # Recipes ## Create soldiers with clay and soul sand ![Clay Soldiers Recipe](https://imgur.com/9ouoSg8.png) ## Use a disruptor to remove all soldiers instantly ![Clay Disruptor Recipe](https://imgur.com/xBkdEGG.png) ## Create Horses for them ![Clay Horses Recipe](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/529/344/recipes.gif) ## You can dye them any color ![Colored Soldier Recipe](https://imgur.com/rm0XvcX.png) After crafting Clay Soldiers, right-click to put them on the ground and watch them fight!
